info.description: API for camp registration and camp operations.
info.title: Camp Registration API

get.description: Catalog organization, season, and program options.
Sessions visible to the active organization.

post.description: Create a session for the active organization.
Create a season for the active organization.
Create a program for the active organization.

patch.description: Update editable program defaults and metadata.

get.description: Session details for editing.

post.description: Record daily attendance, check-in, check-out, or absence for a camper.

get.description: Staff communication templates, scheduled campaigns, and delivery history.

post.description: Create a reusable lifecycle email template draft.

get.description: Families visible to the active organization.

post.description: Create a family record for the active organization.

get.description: Family detail with adults, campers, and contacts.

post.description: Register a camper in a session for this family.
Deprecated parent checkout. Use household order quote and submission APIs.
Cancel an active registration for this family.

Offer available capacity to the next waitlisted registration.

put.description: Replace the authoritative waitlist order for a session.

post.description: Queue another delivery of an active waitlist offer.
Cancel an active waitlist offer and keep its registration in queue.
Cancel an active offer and move its registration to the end of the queue.
Accept an active waitlist offer for a family registration.
Decline an active waitlist offer and release the waitlist registration.

patch.description: Update a contact in a family.

get.description: Reusable form templates, immutable versions, and completion totals.

post.description: Create a reusable form or waiver draft.

patch.description: Revise the editable draft without changing published versions.

post.description: Publish an immutable form version and assign it to selected sessions.

get.description: Published forms required for the parent’s confirmed registrations.

put.description: Save a draft or submit a version-bound parent form response.

get.description: List minimum operational health-readiness projections for authorized staff or a parent’s campers.
Decrypt one camper health record after object-level authorization and record the access.

put.description: Create or replace an application-encrypted health record for an owned camper.

post.description: Submit a saved health record for staff pre-arrival review.
Approve a submitted health record or request parent changes.

get.description: Download a separately authorized and audited restricted health CSV.

post.description: Re-evaluate a missing-recipient notification or replay a terminal delivery failure.

post.description: Preview a cross-session operational report without exporting it.

post.description: Save a reusable operational report view.

delete.description: Delete an owned or administratively managed saved report view.

get.description: Download an audited, tenant-scoped operational session report as CSV.

200.description: A UTF-8 CSV file using the selected operational report preset.
